title: tmesipteris ovata
intro: Tmesipteris ovata, also known as the fern-like club moss, is a species of club moss that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help alleviate various health issues such as skin irritations, wounds, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Tmesipteris ovata include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Tmesipteris ovata can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
